projects.title: Realtime Ticketing Platform
projects.description: Distributed ticketing platform inspired by Ticketmaster and Eventbrite.
projects.highlights: Event-driven architecture, real-time availability updates, microservices, WebSocket, Server-Sent Events and production-oriented observability.

projects.title: Data Processing Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-oriented platform for data ingestion, validation and analytics.
projects.highlights: Batch processing, CSV and JSON ingestion, data validation, PostgreSQL storage, REST APIs and reporting-oriented dashboards.

projects.title: CppRoyale
projects.description: Multiplayer real-time strategy game based on a client-server architecture.
projects.highlights: Client-server communication, custom networking protocol, fixed tick game loop, pathfinding and real-time multiplayer logic.
